title: Garage Door
description: Fully placeable garage door panels that connect together to form larger garage doors. Instead of acting like a standard static door, these panels visually merge into a complete one garage door.
body: Garage Door adds a clean, immersive garage door block to Minecraft, designed for modern builds, workshops, sheds, warehouses, storefronts, and realistic homes. It brings a believable large-entry door style to the game that feels natural alongside vanilla building while giving players a more practical option for vehicle garages, utility buildings, and industrial structures. right click to interact with it. the garage door panels are stackable if your crouched so you can make as big a door as you want. animates open and closed.
